description: Human-authored golden set for support ticket routing. 20 cases spanning all four queues (billing, technical_support, account_access, feature_request) with priority labels and deliberate edge cases: ambiguous intent and mixed-topic tickets.

input.ticket_text: I was double-charged for my Pro plan this month — please refund the extra $30.

cases.notes: Clear duplicate-charge billing case; money at risk -> high.

input.ticket_text: Could you send me the invoice for March? I need it for accounting.
My card on file expired and the renewal failed. How do I update my payment method?
Why did my monthly price jump from $20 to $29 without any notice?
The promo code WELCOME20 did not apply the discount at checkout.
The dashboard returns a 500 error every time I open the Reports tab.

cases.notes: Server error blocking a core page.

input.ticket_text: CSV export has produced an empty file since this morning.
The mobile app freezes whenever I upload a photo larger than 5 MB.
API calls to /v2/orders are timing out intermittently for the last hour.
The text in dark mode is hard to read on the settings page.
I can't log in after resetting my password — it says invalid credentials.
Please delete my account and all of the data associated with it.
I'm locked out after too many login attempts. Can you unlock my account?
How do I enable two-factor authentication on my profile?
I need to change the email address associated with my account.
It would be great if you added a calendar view for tasks.
Please consider supporting Slack notifications for new comments.
Any plans to add bulk editing for records? It would save our team hours.

cases.notes: High-value suggestion; still a request, slightly elevated.

input.ticket_text: Could you add an option to export to Excel in addition to CSV?
Our Zapier integration stopped working right after your latest pricing change.

cases.notes: Ambiguous billing-vs-technical; the broken integration is the actionable issue -> technical_support.
